name: Key Ideas
description: Extract the strongest ideas and explain why they matter.

name: Lessons Learned
description: Turn the video into practical lessons and takeaways.

name: Obsidian Note
description: Generate a structured PKM note for Obsidian.

name: Facebook Post
description: Convert the video into a readable Facebook post.
template:
Write a Facebook post based on this YouTube video.

Video title: {VIDEO_TITLE}
Source: {VIDEO_URL}

Requirements:
- Hook in the first 2 lines
- Clear paragraph breaks
- Practical insights from the video
- Friendly but not exaggerated tone
- End with a discussion question

Transcript:
{TRANSCRIPT}

name: Viral Caption
description: Create short-form captions and hooks for social media.
template:
Create viral short-form captions from this video.

Video: {VIDEO_TITLE}
Channel: {CHANNEL_NAME}

Output:
- 10 short hooks
- 5 captions under 180 characters
- 5 punchy one-liners
- 5 hashtag sets

Keep it accurate to the transcript.

Transcript:
{TRANSCRIPT}

name: Slide Deck
description: Turn the transcript into a slide deck outline.

name: Flashcards
description: Generate study flashcards from the transcript.
template:
Create study flashcards from this video transcript.

Video: {VIDEO_TITLE}

Format each card as:
Q: ...
A: ...

Include:
- Definitions
- Key ideas
- Examples
- Common mistakes
- Application questions

Transcript:
{TRANSCRIPT}

name: Action Checklist
description: Extract concrete next actions from the video.
template:
Turn this YouTube video into an action checklist.

Video: {VIDEO_TITLE}
Source: {VIDEO_URL}

Output:
- Quick summary
- Step-by-step checklist
- Tools/resources mentioned
- What to do today
- What to review later

Transcript:
{TRANSCRIPT}

name: Product Ideas
description: Find product, feature, or business ideas from the content.
template:
Analyze this YouTube transcript for product opportunities.

Video: {VIDEO_TITLE}
Channel: {CHANNEL_NAME}

Output:
- Problems mentioned or implied
- Potential users
- Product ideas
- Feature ideas
- Monetization angles
- Risks or assumptions
- Best 3 ideas to validate first

Transcript:
{TRANSCRIPT}
